document.docTitle: Crepis newii subsp. oliveriana C. Jeffrey & Beentje

subSubSection.paragraph: Crepis newii Oliv. & Hiern subsp. oliveriana (Kuntze) C.Jeffrey & Beentje —
Habitat: LMDF, HZ; 1 600–3 800 m. Distribution: II.
Voucher: Chogoria Track, near Waterfall, Alt. 3 184 m, 25 Jan. 2015, SAJIT 002821 (EA).
